## Exposes

### Action (enum)
Triggered action (e.g. a button click).
Value can be found in the published state on the `action` property.
It's not possible to read (`/get`) or write (`/set`) this value.
The possible values are: `button_1_click`, `button_1_hold`, `button_1_release`, `button_2_click`, `button_2_hold`, `button_2_release`, `button_3_click`, `button_3_hold`, `button_3_release`.
